reports.name: Monthly Revenue Dashboard
reports.description: Tracks MRR, ARR, and churn metrics across all product lines. Updated daily with data from Snowflake.

reports.name: Expense Tracking by Department
reports.description: Departmental expense breakdown with budget vs actuals. Supports drill-down by cost center and vendor.

reports.description: AI-generated analysis of FY26 budget performance with variance explanations and forecasting.

access.restricted_message: This report contains sensitive financial data. Request access through ServiceNow or contact lisa.wong@amplitude.com.

reports.name: Customer Health Score Tracker
reports.description: AI-powered health scores by account with risk indicators. Combines product usage, support tickets, and NPS data.

reports.name: Renewal Forecast Dashboard
reports.description: Upcoming renewals with probability scores and revenue impact. Integrates with Salesforce opportunity data.

reports.name: Pipeline Analytics
reports.description: Real-time pipeline view by stage, rep, and region. Tracks conversion rates and deal velocity.

reports.name: Win/Loss Analysis
reports.description: AI-generated analysis of closed deals identifying patterns in wins and losses by segment and competitor.

access.restricted_message: Contains competitive intelligence. Request access from your Sales VP or contact rachel.kim@amplitude.com.

reports.name: Sprint Velocity & Burndown
reports.description: Engineering team velocity metrics, sprint burndowns, and story point trends across squads.

reports.name: Campaign Performance Overview
reports.description: Multi-channel campaign metrics including email, paid, and organic. Tracks CAC, CPL, and attribution.

reports.name: Content Engagement Heatmap
reports.description: AI-generated content performance analysis showing engagement patterns, top-performing assets, and recommendations.

reports.name: Headcount & Attrition Dashboard
reports.description: Organization headcount, attrition rates, and hiring pipeline by department and level.

access.restricted_message: Contains sensitive HR data. Access limited to People Ops team and VP+. Contact nicole.brown@amplitude.com.

reports.name: Support Ticket Analytics
reports.description: Ticket volume trends, SLA compliance, CSAT scores, and resolution time by category and priority.
